terms.definition: One of Indonesia's regencies or cities shown on the map.
terms.firstUse: Regions include Indonesia's regencies and cities.

terms.definition: Select one or more regions and give them a color.
terms.firstUse: Highlight regions one at a time when you do not need spreadsheet data.

terms.definition: Turn local spreadsheet rows into map colors.
terms.firstUse: Paste data or upload a spreadsheet. Your data stays on this device.

terms.definition: Connect spreadsheet rows to regions on the map.
terms.firstUse: Match regions before you create the map. Unmatched rows remain visible.

terms.definition: Rows that are not yet connected to one region.
terms.firstUse: Unmatched regions do not change the map until you choose a match.

terms.definition: Use numeric values to assign map colors.
terms.firstUse: Color by value to compare higher and lower numbers.

terms.definition: Give each category a different color.
terms.firstUse: Color by category when each row contains a label such as High or Low.

terms.definition: Choose colors, legend, title, and map settings.
terms.firstUse: Design map after the regions are matched.

terms.definition: Download the map as SVG, PNG, or PDF.
terms.firstUse: Export map when the map and source details are ready.

terms.definition: Download a local project file that can be opened later.
terms.firstUse: Save project to keep a portable copy.

terms.definition: Choose a saved local project file and open it after safety checks pass.
terms.firstUse: Open project replaces the current project only after the file passes safety checks.

terms.definition: Remove highlights while keeping the page open.
terms.firstUse: Clear map removes every current highlight.

terms.definition: Reset the workspace and remove the current browser backup after confirmation. A compatibility recovery copy may remain until you delete it separately.
terms.firstUse: Start over when you want a clean workspace.

terms.definition: Future workflow for grouping regions into a sales hierarchy.
terms.firstUse: Build sales territories from matched regions.

terms.definition: Future workflow for comparing current and target coverage.
terms.firstUse: Analyze coverage using data you provide.

advancedOnly.allowed: source, license, methodology, and advanced boundary details only
source, methodology, diagnostics, and developer evidence only
methodology article after a plain explanation only
